visual_narrative: The video opens with a sharp urban stop (crosswalk encounter) then flows through tree-lined streets and golden-lit residential areas for the first reflective fact about change being slow. After a Mercadona pass-by transition, the second fact shows recycling infrastructure (blue bin visible from the bike) and street signage. A Burger King landmark bridges into the climactic third fact: the artificial plant discarded next to recycling bins — a perfect visual metaphor for waste and second chances. The CTA plays over an open plaza pause and a stunning beach sunset. The series hook rides out on a scenic palm-tree-lined path before stopping peacefully near the beach.
available_scenes: Sharp crosswalk stop (urban energy, attention grab)

Cyclist stops on bike path near beach (peaceful ending)
